nasb.text: And again He came and found them sleeping, for their eyes were very heavy; and they did not know what to answer Him.

esv.text: And again he came and found them sleeping, for their eyes were very heavy, and they did not know what to answer him.

cnv.text: 他再回來的時候，看見門徒睡著了；因為他們十分疲倦，不知道該怎樣回答他。

ccb.text: 祂回来时见他们又睡着了，因为他们困得眼皮发沉，也不知道对祂说什么。

csbs.text: 他又回来，看见他们在睡觉，因为他们的眼皮发沉，也不知道要回答耶稣什么。
